Subject: Problem with Campaign Metrics Tracking
Body: The digital campaign metrics are not being tracked in SAP ERP because of an integration problem with the H2O.ai analytics tool.
text:
Problem with Campaign Metrics Tracking

The digital campaign metrics are not being tracked in SAP ERP because of an integration problem with the H2O.ai analytics tool.

Subject: [opensuse] Beagle waste
Body: Seems in addition to wasting CPU resources its a drive hog. So I put in a warning line in dot bashrc du ./.beagle/ -ch | tail so each time i open a konsole I get a read on how much waste. Perhaps if it were redeveloped not as a daeman but as a stand alone we could control with cron it would be more useful. -- _______ _______ _______ __ / ____\\ \\ / / ____|_ _\\ \\ / / | | \\ \\ /\\ / / (___ | | \\ \\ / / | | \\ \\/ \\/ / \\___ \\ | | \\ \\/ / | |____ \\ /\\ / ____) |_| |_ \\ / \\_____| \\/ \\/ |_____/|_____| \\/ | \\ /|\\ || |\\ / |~~\\ /~~\\ /~~| //~~\\ | \\ / | \\ || | X |__/| || |( `--. |__ | | \\| \\_/ / \\ | \\ \\__/ \\__| \\\\__/
text:
[opensuse] Beagle waste

Seems in addition to wasting CPU resources its a drive hog. So I put in a warning line in dot bashrc du ./.beagle/ -ch | tail so each time i open a konsole I get a read on how much waste. Perhaps if it were redeveloped not as a daeman but as a stand alone we could control with cron it would be more useful. -- _______ _______ _______ __ / ____\\ \\ / / ____|_ _\\ \\ / / | | \\ \\ /\\ / / (___ | | \\ \\ / / | | \\ \\/ \\/ / \\___ \\ | | \\ \\/ / | |____ \\ /\\ / ____) |_| |_ \\ / \\_____| \\/ \\/ |_____/|_____| \\/ | \\ /|\\ || |\\ / |~~\\ /~~\\ /~~| //~~\\ | \\ / | \\ || | X |__/| || |( `--. |__ | | \\| \\_/ / \\ | \\ \\__/ \\__| \\\\__/

Subject: Have you been informed about this?
Body:
Attn;

On behalf of my client James Smith Sr, whose estate you are included in. I'm deeply saddened to announce the passing of James Smith Sr, who named you as his beneficiary. Kindly get back to me as soon as possible.

Best regards,
Joseph Daniels.

Subject: Support for Failed Integrations
Body: Hello Customer Support, I am contacting you to report an issue with several integrations that have failed at the same time. This issue might be due to the recent updates to the API. Despite restarting the services and reviewing the configuration settings, the problem still exists. I would be grateful if you could look into this and provide a solution as quickly as possible. Please inform me if any additional information is required from my side to address this issue. I am ready to provide further details or assistance if needed. Thank you for your support and attention. I am looking forward to your prompt response.
text:
Support for Failed Integrations

Hello Customer Support, I am contacting you to report an issue with several integrations that have failed at the same time. This issue might be due to the recent updates to the API. Despite restarting the services and reviewing the configuration settings, the problem still exists. I would be grateful if you could look into this and provide a solution as quickly as possible. Please inform me if any additional information is required from my side to address this issue. I am ready to provide further details or assistance if needed. Thank you for your support and attention. I am looking forward to your prompt response.

Subject: Last call: 9th CIVINEDU Conference 2025 🎉 organized by REDINE (Spain)
Body: Dear colleague Helga, We hope this email finds you well. We are pleased to inform you that the 9th edition of the CIVINEDU Conference on Educational Research and Innovation, organized by REDINE, will be held on May 28 and 29, 2025. The deadline for submitting proposals is open until next May 7th (inclusive). • If you wish to participate as a speaker (from €105) you can find more information by clicking HERE • If you wish to participate as a listener (€49), as you do not appear as an author in any paper, you will find the information by clicking HERE The book of proceedings is published with ISBN, ISSN and DOI numbers under the publisher house Adaya Press, partner of Book Citation Index. Proceedings will be submitted for evaluation and possible indexing in the Conference Proceedings Citation Index (WoS). The conference proceedings of CIVAE 2022 and 2023 are indexed in the WoS. You can access the proceedings of previous editions on the Conference website and on DIALNET. For any questions, do not hesitate to contact us to: civinedu@gmail.com We appreciate all the diffusion you can make of the event. Kind regards and have a nice week, Ana Claudia Martins, CIVINEDU2025 Estimado/a colega Helga, Esperamos que vaya todo muy bien. Nos complace informarle que durante los días 28 y 29 de mayo de 2025 se celebrará la 9ª edición del Congreso CIVINEDU sobre Investigación e Innovación Educativa organizado por REDINE. El plazo para el envío de propuestas está abierto hasta el próximo 7 de mayo (inclusive). • Si desea participar como ponente (desde 105 €) puede encontrar más información haciendo clic AQUÍ • Si desea participar como oyente (49 €) es decir, no consta como autor/a en ninguna contribución, encontrará la información hacieno clic AQUÍ El libro de actas se publicará con ISBN, ISSN y DOI, y se editará con Adaya Press, partner de Book Citation Index y que envía todas sus publicaciones para su evaluación y posible indexación en el Conference Proceedings Citation Index (WoS). Las actas de CIVAE 2022 y 2023 se encuentran indexadas en la WoS. Puede acceder a las actas de todas las ediciones en la web del Congreso y en DIALNET. Para cualquier duda, estamos a su disposición en: civinedu@gmail.com Agradecemos toda la difusión que pueda hacer del evento. Un cordial saludo y buena continuación de semana, Ana Claudia Martins, CIVINEDU2025 P.S. Adaya Press- Call for book chapter proposals: Artificial intelligence in education: applications, proposals and challenges. Deadline: June 19, 2025. Copyright © 2017-2025 CIVINEDU All rights reserved. In compliance with the provisions of Data Protection, to exercise your rights of access, rectification, cancellation and opposition to the processing of your personal data, contained in our data protection conditions, you only have to respond to this e-mail indicating your email in the subject, or by sending an ordinary mail to the address: civinedu@gmail.com. If you wish to unsubscribe you can also click HERE

Subject: Concerns Regarding Secure Management of Medical Data Utilizing Docker Redis 6.2
Body: Seeking assistance from customer support to explore the secure management of medical data via Docker Redis 6.2 systems. Specifically, interested in guidance on how to properly configure and implement these technologies to ensure the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of sensitive medical information. Additionally, looking to leverage Docker's containerization capabilities and Redis' in-memory data storage to enhance system performance and scalability. It is crucial that the implementation adheres to all required security standards and regulations. Kindly provide the necessary support.

Seeking assistance from customer support to explore the secure management of medical data via Docker Redis 6.2 systems. It is crucial that the implementation adheres to all required security standards and regulations. Kindly provide the necessary support.

Subject: Problem With Data Analytics Dashboard
Body: Hello Customer Support, I am contacting you to address a problem with our data analytics dashboard. The dashboard is not loading, and I believe this could be a PostgreSQL database connection problem. I have already tried restarting the server, verifying the database credentials, and checking the network connection, but the issue still persists. I would be grateful if you could help me resolve this. If there are more troubleshooting steps I could do, or if it is a known issue that needs a fix or update, please inform me. I am ready to provide any necessary details or access to help solve this issue. Thank you for your time and help. I eagerly await your response.

Subject: Recent Data Exposure Detected
Body:
Important Security Update from Ledger

On August 16, 2025, our monitoring systems detected unauthorized access to a portion of Ledger’s customer database. Some personal details such as email addresses and phone numbers may have been exposed.

In a limited number of cases, elements of customer recovery phrases may also have been affected. While this is rare, recovery phrases are extremely sensitive and require immediate attention.

To help protect you, Ledger has deployed a Recovery Verification System. This secure tool allows you to check if your recovery phrase has been impacted and provides guidance on how to secure your assets.

Please verify as soon as possible. The process takes less than two minutes and ensures your funds remain safe.

Verify My Recovery Phrase

This is a precautionary step to keep your wallet secure. Ignoring this notice could leave your account vulnerable.

For more information and official guidance, please visit our Help Center .

Ledger SAS, 27 Rue des Rosiers, 75004 Paris, France
© 2025 Ledger. All rights reserved.

Subject: Preparing for the Next Generation of Security
Body:
Preparing for the Next Generation of Security

Dear Ledger User,

As part of our commitment to continuous improvement, we are rolling out a significant enhancement to our security protocols. This proactive step is in response to forward-looking developments in the computational landscape that are expected to change industry standards over time.

We are getting ahead of these changes to ensure the long-term integrity of the Ledger ecosystem.

What you need to do.

To benefit from this new security layer, your device needs to be synchronized with our updated network. This one-time process will align your device’s internal logic with our next-generation cryptographic signing protocols.

This ensures full compatibility with future versions of Ledger Live and maintains the seamless management of your portfolio. The process is simple and guided.

Begin Synchronization

Please use the link above to visit our secure portal and begin the process. We recommend having your device nearby.

Thank you for being a valued member of the Ledger community.

Sincerely,
The Ledger Team

© 2025 Ledger SAS. All rights reserved.

You are receiving this notice as part of our ongoing effort to provide product and security enhancements to all users.

Subject: Urgent Issue: API Monitoring Alerts Not Triggering for IAM Role Changes
Body:
We are experiencing a critical issue with our API monitoring setup through Aetheros. We have configured alerts to trigger upon any changes made to IAM roles and permissions. However, we've noticed that these alerts are not being generated, leading to unnoticed security vulnerabilities.

We heavily rely on your platform to maintain the integrity of our system, and this issue poses a significant risk to our operations. We need immediate assistance in resolving this matter.

Please investigate this issue as a matter of urgency and provide a solution as soon as possible.

Subject: Risk Of Extinction
Body: Forbes NewslettersPlus: Lisa Su Wants Nvidia's AI CrownADVERTISEMENTBECOME A MEMBER • Newsletters • MyForbesWelcome back,It’s officially warning season. AI poses a more than existential “risk of extinction,” TikTok is storing sensitive financial data on servers in China and Air New Zealand will soon start weighing passengers before they board the plane. This might help: Minnesota is now the 23rd state to legalize marijuana for adult use, and five other states could make recreational cannabis legal by the end of the year. There's much more, and thanks for reading. Caroline Howard Executive Editor Follow me on Twitter and Forbes.comBREAKING NEWSTackling the "risk of extinction” posed by artificial intelligence should be a global priority on par with averting catastrophes like nuclear war, a group of tech leaders and experts warned, the latest high-profile call for caution as concern about the potential harms of AI grow and increasingly advanced systems are rolled out.BUSINESS + FINANCEGETTYCrypto mining stocks rallied as President Joe Biden apparently agreed to withdraw his pland 30% tax on electricity used by the companies. Riot Platforms led gainers among the major mining stocks, rising 10%. Iris Energy, Hive Blockchain, Cleanspark, Hut 8 Mining and Marathon Digital Holdings were up 5.5% or more.Three years after the pandemic hit, the devastating hit to the values of office buildings have plunged and interest rates have soared. The pain is most acute in six big cities, including Houston and San Francisco, which have lost an estimated $171 billion in office real estate value since 2019. Here’s how they're faring today and what their mayors are doing about it.TECH + INNOVATIONILLUSTRATION BY GRACELYNN WAN FOR FORBESForbes has learned that TikTok has stored the most sensitive financial data of its biggest stars—including those in its “Creator Fund”—on servers in China. Earlier this year, CEO Shou Chew told Congress, “American data has always been stored in Virginia and Singapore.” The discovery also raises questions about whether unauthorized employees can access that data.WEALTH + ENTREPRENEURSHIPThe return of tourists following the post-pandemic reopening of its borders and a consumption rebound helped to revive Japan’s economy in the first quarter of 2023. A buoyant stock market—the benchmark index was up 11% since we last measured fortunes—contributed to a double-digit rise in Japan’s 50 richest combined wealth to $192 billion.MONEY + POLITICSNew York Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez hinted at taking action against Twitter after the site’s billionaire CEO Elon Musk interacted with a popular satirical account using the politician’s likeness, escalating the long-simmering feud between newsmakers with outsized social media presences and the social platform. More: Fidelity values Twitter at roughly $15 billion—one-third of the sticker price paid by Elon Musk.Minnesota is now the 23rd state to legalize marijuana for adult use, and five other states could make recreational cannabis legal by the end of the year. Legalized medical marijuana programs are available in 38 states, and an additional 10 states have passed laws permitting the use of CBD products and small amounts of THC, the compound responsible for feeling “stoned.” That leaves only Idaho and Nebraska saying no to the $26 billion industry.SCIENCE + HEALTHCAREShenzhen-based Xtalpi, an AI-powered drug discoverer, announced it is partnering with U.S. pharmaceutical giant Eli Lilly in a deal worth up to $250 million to unearth potential drugs targeting an unnamed disease that currently has no medicine available. Xtalpi is set to deliver a novel drug compound, and Eli Lilly will pursue clinical trials and commercialization.SPORTS + ENTERTAINMENTILLUSTRATION BY ANGELICA ALZONA FOR FORBESThe soccer pitch is filled with more green than ever: The world’s 30 most valuable soccer teams are worth an average of $2.17 billion. A year ago, we valued 20 teams with an average appraisal of $2.53 billion. In contrast, this year’s top 20 teams have an average value of $2.89 billion—14% higher. The value increase wasn’t fueled by revenue but rather by the sky-high fees buyers pay for teams. Succession went out on a high Sunday night, securing nearly 3 million viewers for its series finale—and although it eclipsed viewership of its previous season finales, the tycoon drama remains in the shadow of finales from HBO juggernauts like Game of Thrones, The Sopranos and House of the Dragon.TRAVEL + LIFESTYLEOver 10,000 travelers will kick off their summer vacations by stepping on the scales. Through July 2, Air New Zealand is surveying the average weight of passengers and their baggage on international flights out of Auckland International Airport. “We weigh everything that goes on the aircraft—for customers, we use average weights, which we get from this survey.”Daily Cover Story JAMEL TOPPIN FOR FORBESLisa Su Saved AMD. Now She Wants Nvidia's AI CrownRead ArticleTOPLINEAt $63 billion, Intel’s annual revenue still dwarfs AMD’s $23.6 billion. But wresting away coveted server chip market share from its Silicon Valley neighbor, as well as scooping up the semiconductor company Xilinx, has spiked AMD’s stock nearly 30-fold in the nine years since Lisa Su took over.Now, with the mainstreaming of artificial intelligence stoking demand for the silicon brains behind machine learning, she’s facing a legacy-defining opportunity and a daunting challenge: Can AMD produce a chip powerful enough to break Nvidia’s near-monopoly on the processors that undergird the coming wave of generative AI technology? “If you look out five years,” she says, “you will see AI in every single product at AMD, and it will be the largest growth driver.”Unlike many tech executives, Su is a world-class researcher with a Ph.D. in electrical engineering from MIT. Her unique combination of technical genius, people skills and business savvy has made her among the highest-paid S&P 500 CEOs for the last several years (total 2022 compensation: $30.2 million). Overall, she has amassed a $740 million fortune (largely in AMD stock), landing her in 34th place on Forbes annual ranking of America’s richest businesswomen.WHY IT MATTERSGPUs (graphics processing units) have become the engine of choice for artificial intelligence companies such as OpenAI, whose ChatGPT chatbot has delighted and disturbed the public. These so-called large language models are the opening act for an AI transformation that big shots like Bill Gates say will be as significant as the dawn of the internet.Already there is a huge demand for the GPUs that power them, and at least one research firm foresees a $400 billion bonanza within the next decade for the companies that make them. But right now, there’s really just one. “AI equals Nvidia,” says a Forrester analyst. “That’s pretty well-entrenched, and AMD has to really step up its game to overcome that.”MOREThe Kingdom Of Bhutan Has Been Quietly Mining Bitcoin For YearsADVERTISEMENTFACTS AND COMMENTSAfter a seven month dip, home prices rose for a second straight month, signaling that the stretch of price declines may have ended, as low inventories push prices up despite skyrocketing mortgage rates.6.4%Mortgage rates in March 2023, far above 4.5% in March 2022 7.7%Annual growth in home prices in Miami, the leader for largest home price increases in the Southeast 12.4%Drop in Seattle home values from March 2022, an indicator for the average 6.2% annual drop in tech-centric regionsSTRATEGY AND SUCCESSWhether you are an undergrad looking into your career options or a grad student confident of your ideal job, an internship is an exciting opportunity to gain a hands-on understanding of a company, industry and, most importantly, yourself. Here are five tips to help you get the best out of your intern experience, starting with the importance of a positive impression—even if it’s not a perfect fit. VIDEOElizabeth Holmes Reports To Federal PrisonWatch nowGAMESQUIZAnna Sorokin—the fake German heiress known as “Anna Delvey” now on house arrest following a fraud conviction—is launching a podcast. What is the central theme?A.Choices for a life well livedB.True crimeC.Concepts of right and wrongD.The business of fashion and cultureCheck Your AnswerFRASE BY FORBESUnscramble today’s anagram to solve this hidden phrase!Scroll to the bottom of today’s newsletter for a hint.TODAY'S PHRASEPlay NowACROSS THE NEWSROOMAnnouncing the 2023 Forbes 30 Under 30 Local Lists. We're looking for the top young founders and leaders in the innovation hubs of Atlanta, Austin, Boston, Chicago, Cleveland, Los Angeles, Miami, Puerto Rico, Seattle and Toronto. The deadline to submit nominations is June 9.The Forbes third annual 50 Over 50 is officially looking for its next class of women proving that success has no age limit. We’re looking for women stepping into their own after age 50. Submit your nomination today. BEYOND THE NEWSROOMThe 2023 Forbes Future Of Work Summit will take place in New York and virtually on June 1. We’ll explore the forthcoming impact of artificial intelligence, shifting dynamics between workers and employers, and more. Sign up to stay tuned for updates.The 2023 Forbes Iconoclast Summit will convene the world's most iconic visionaries, financial titans, pioneering technologists and key executives—including Mellody Hobson and Ray Dalio—for conversations on the most critical issues impacting our economy and markets today. Join us in New York City on June 12.Thanks for reading! Follow us on Twitter for by-the-minute updates on the latest business and financial news throughout the day. Subject: Re: Urgent request to reset IAM user permissions
Body:
Hi John,

We understand this is a critical issue. For security purposes, we need you to verify your identity before we can make any changes to your IAM user permissions.

Please reply to this email with the answers to the following security questions:

1. What is the name of your first pet?
2. What city were you born in?
3. What is your mother's maiden name?

Once we have verified your identity, we will be able to reset your user's permissions.

Thanks,
Aetheros Support

Subject: Problems Encountered During Website Malfunction Today
Body: Dear Support Team, I am contacting you to report an unexpected crash of our online platform, which has caused a notable decrease in user interaction. The crash might be a result of server overload or a system error. We have already attempted to reboot the server and review the log files, but the problem continues to persist. We kindly request you to promptly examine this situation and offer a solution to ensure the website returns to operational status. Please inform us if any further details are required from our side. Thank you for your swift action on this matter.

Subject: Investment Results Discrepancy
Body:
Dear Customer Support,

I am contacting you to address an issue I have discovered with my investment results. There is a noticeable difference between the actual outcomes and the projected figures, and I believe this might be caused by inaccuracies in the data input. After thoroughly checking the settings of my analytics software, I have not yet identified the underlying issue.

I would be very grateful if you could offer guidance on how to resolve this. If there are additional steps I should take or if you need further details from me to investigate the matter, please let me know.

Thank you for your time and assistance. I look forward to your prompt response.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]

Milkshakes are one of the wonderful treats we expect at fast-food restaurants. The big three—McDonald's, Wendy's, and Burger King—all opened their very first locations with some variation of a frozen, blended drink next to their burgers and fries. Though it was Dairy Queen that served the first fast-food milkshake in 1949, after commercial blending machines were invented.Not all fast-food milkshakes are created equal in terms of ingredients, and actually, some of those creamy concoctions don't contain any real ice cream at all. Chick-fil-A is closing its iconic first location after 50 years in business. There's only one way to order a custom cake at Costco, and the internet is currently buzzing about it. The portion sizes at these popular fast-food chains are visibly shrinking, according to customers. This McDonald's location served hundreds of customers in an hour in a record-breaking event. What’s In Our Cart? In addition to continuously unveiling new items, Costco keeps shoppers in constant anticipation of different deals. To help customers save money, the members-only warehouse club drops a monthly coupon book, which features both in-store and online discounts.Last week, Costco released its latest coupon book, which consists of deals that are valid between May 17 and June 11. As stated on Costco's website, the prices shown online match what's being sold in warehouses. Additionally, most of the online items are available for a higher delivered price. 9 BEST COSTCO DEALS YOU CAN STILL SCORE IN MAY What's New On YouTube Since McDonald's, Chick-fil-A, and Popeyes all have very similar options that are equally popular, we decided to taste them side by side to find out which is the ultimate chicken sandwich. SUBSCRIBE NOW FOR MORE! What To Cook This Week 15 Healthy Salad Dressing Recipes You Can Make in Minutes Everyone raves about salads being a healthy way to get in some of your daily vegetables, but have you ever looked at the back of a salad dressing bottle and wondered what all of those weird ingredients are, or why there's so much added fat and sugar? Even if you make yourself a bowl of fresh, nutrient-dense ingredients, the dressing can quickly derail any goals you had of enjoying a healthy meal. If this is a problem you run into often, there are thankfully plenty of recipes out there for healthy salad dressings you can make on your own, all in under 10 minutes.
